utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details:
- property: includes selected property with details and price (address, details, price) – fully specified.
- financing: requires financing solution with terms. Provided solution type, terms (amount), and costs/fee – sufficiently specified.
- legal_services: requires legal services with costs. Provided service description and costs – specified. (Note: user asked also for property surveys; that appears under total_budget as structural_survey, but the legal_services item itself is okay.)
- moving_services: requires moving arrangements with costs. Provided service type and costs – specified.
- setup_services: utility and setup services. Provided service description and costs – specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Provided line items including property price, financing fee, legal package, structural survey, moving, utility setup, totals – specified.
All 6 items are present and sufficiently detailed per the format.
